summary: Regression + new-feature verification pass after lucide-react icon swap and 2 CSS variable bug fixes on the MiniPay checkout mini-app. Tested full Intro -> Buy (Stars/Premium toggle) -> Review -> Edit order flow at 420px mobile viewport via https://<preview-domain>/minipay/. All icons render correctly (verified via DOM inspection + zoomed screenshots, not just visual glance), both CSS bugs (--mint-2, --green-ink) are confirmed fixed, and no regressions found in previously-verified flows.
critical_code_review_comments: notice-icon (Smartphone) svg is only 20x20px - at first glance in a compressed screenshot it can look like a 'tofu' box; verified via DOM/scaled zoom that it IS the correct lucide smartphone icon rendering with proper gold stroke color (var(--gold) resolves to rgb(242,185,59)). No actual bug, just a visual-inspection false alarm worth noting for future testers.
Buy.tsx still handles both Buy form and Review screen via a mode state (~310+ lines) - same note as iteration_1, not urgent.
verified_flows: Intro screen: app-icon.png (StarStore star, naturalWidth=554, alt='StarStore') renders correctly inside dark rounded frame with teal glow, centered above title 'Buy Telegram Stars with MiniPay' - PASS, matches reference intent, no broken image (0 broken imgs detected via naturalWidth check)
Checklist rows show clean teal-square checkmark icons (lucide Check) - PASS, crisp and consistent
Get started (data-testid=intro-get-started-button) -> Buy screen navigation - PASS
Buy screen (Stars tab): 6 package rows (15/25/50/100/500/1000 Stars) each show gold star icon in circular badge - PASS
Switched to Premium tab (data-testid=type-toggle-premium): 3 duration rows (3/6/12 months) show purple crown icon in circular badge instead of stars - PASS, icons swap correctly per type

Next steps card: progress bar renders solid green (getComputedStyle confirmed, no black/transparent) - PASS, confirms --green-ink bug fix; '2 of 3' badge has light green pill background rgb(231,249,238) with green text rgb(22,128,61), not a mismatched mint color - PASS, confirms --mint-2 bug fix

Notice card 'Open this page inside MiniPay...': icon confirmed via DOM (svg.lucide-smartphone) and scaled zoom screenshot to be a correctly-rendered phone icon with gold stroke, not broken/missing glyph - PASS

TrustCard on Review ('You're always in control'): top badge is a clean green shield-check icon (lucide ShieldCheck), each of 3 bullets has a small solid-green circular checkmark - PASS, crisp rendering confirmed via zoomed screenshot
Review hero: gold star icon badge (Star type) displays correctly above the $0.45 amount, centered, matches selected package type - PASS

Disabled 'MiniPay not detected' button: background rgb(233,234,236) grey, text color rgb(107,114,128) grey (slightly darker/more readable than iteration_1's rgb(154,161,171), improving the previously-flagged contrast nit) - PASS, no regression to pink/salmon

Full click-through: Intro -> Get started -> Buy form -> fill username 'testuser123' -> toggle Premium/Stars -> select token -> Continue -> Review screen (Confirm Transaction eyebrow, detail card, TrustCard, disabled connect button) -> Edit order returns to form with username 'testuser123' preserved - PASS end-to-end
Zero console errors and zero pageerrors captured across the entire flow (Intro through Review and back) - PASS
SVG icon counts sane across screens (Buy/Stars tab: 9 svgs, Buy/Premium tab: 7 svgs) confirming icon library swap did not drop any icons

success_rate.backend: N/A - not tested per request (frontend only)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - no functional, visual, or console-error issues found

test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth for this mini-app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clean pass, no bugs found this round. lucide-react icon swap is fully verified across Intro/Buy(Stars+Premium)/Review/TrustCard/NextSteps/Notice - all icons render correctly with proper colors, no broken/missing glyphs. Both CSS variable bugs (--mint-2 in Status.css, --green-ink in NextSteps.css) are confirmed fixed via computed style checks. Status.tsx (post-payment polling, GlowIcon component) was intentionally not reached since it requires a live backend/wallet callback, per instructions - not a gap in this pass, by design.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found this round.
